description: General-purpose button component with multiple visual variants (Primary, Secondary, Ghost, Danger, Outline, Link, Default), sizes (Xs, Sm, Md, Lg), optional icon, loading state with spinner, and full-width block mode.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: HTML button type attribute. Defaults to Button.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style variant. Defaults to Primary.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Icon name (use IconNames constants). Shown left of content by default.

parameters.name: IconRight
parameters.description: When true the icon renders after the child content.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Shows a loading spinner and disables the button.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Text displayed instead of child content when IsLoading is true.

parameters.name: Block
parameters.description: Stretches the button to full width of its container.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible label. Omitted from HTML when null.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Fired when the button is clicked (and not disabled/loading).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) to apply to the button.
